key.name: disabled-apps
key.description: List of app IDs to hide from the tray. Apps in this list will not show tray icons even when running.

key.name: icon-mode
key.description: How to display tray icons. 'symbolic' converts icons to monochrome to match the panel style. 'original' shows the app's original colored icons.

key.name: app-order
key.description: Custom ordering of tray items by app ID. Apps not in this list appear in discovery order.

key.name: icon-overrides
key.description: Map of app IDs to custom icon names or file paths. When set, these override the app-provided icon.

key.name: icon-effect-overrides
key.description: Map of app IDs to JSON-encoded effect parameters. Each value is a JSON object with: desaturation (0-1), brightness (-1 to 1), contrast (0-2), useTint (boolean), tintColor ([r,g,b] 0-1 each).

key.name: icon-fallback-overrides
key.description: List of app IDs whose icon overrides are only used when the app sends a pixbuf or no icon.

key.name: icon-lock-overrides
key.description: List of app IDs whose icon overrides ignore app status icon changes. When locked, the chosen override stays in place regardless of NewIcon signals from the app.

key.name: title-aliases
key.summary: Display-name aliases for apps with unstable SNI Ids
key.description: Maps an app's display name to a stable appId used as the settings key. Opt-in per app via the "Match by App Name" switch in icon customization. Intended for apps (e.g. Karing) that randomize their SNI Id on every launch.

key.name: overflow-enabled
key.description: When enabled, tray items beyond the inline limit collapse into a single overflow button at the rightmost end of the tray.

key.name: overflow-inline-count
key.description: Number of tray items to show directly in the panel before overflowing into the overflow button's menu. Set to 0 to keep every tray item in the overflow menu. Range: 0-20.

key.name: overflow-icon-style
key.description: How to render the overflow button in the panel. 'dynamic' previews up to four hidden tray icons; 'static' uses the bundled tray glyph.
